condition: player.docked and player.location == "sorrow_station" and "stood_for_prudence" in player.flags and not ("grissom_said_his_piece" in player.flags)

opens.text: You. Yeah, I know you — you're the one put your body between me and the machine. Whole deck knows. Dockers buy each other's drinks over stories like that, and nobody's bought mine since.

choices.text: She's crew. I'd do it again.

crew_answer.text: Crew. Right. The loader that took my contract was somebody's crew too, I figure. — He turns back to his glass. — Fly safe, captain. Word gets around about people who pick machines over men. Both kinds of word.

wrist.text: He looks at his wrist like it belongs to someone else. — Sprained. She could've snapped it and the room knows she chose not to. You asking is more than the arbiter did. — It isn't forgiveness. It's the shape forgiveness would take, later, if it came.
